runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "go", "build_system": "make", "package_manager": "go", "build_commands": ["make dep", "make build-go", "make build-js"], "install_commands": [], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "unknown", "system_packages": []}, "repo_type": "monorepo", "base_image": "ubuntu:noble-20260210.1", "base_image_rationale": "A stable, official Ubuntu base closely aligned with the project's Debian-derived environment, enabling consistent builds without using non-official Photoprism images.", "pitfalls": ["The base image may not include project-specific prerequisites; explicit toolchain installation may be required during Dockerfile generation.", "The Dockerfile references sudo; many official bases don't include sudo by default, which could fail unless sudo is installed or commands are run as root."], "notes": "This blueprint assumes a two-front-end build (Go backend and JS frontend) via the Makefile targets. The Makefile relies on external scripts (scripts/build.sh, install-tensorflow.sh, etc.) which may require additional system dependencies not captured here."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Stage 1: Builder
FROM photoprism/develop:260309-questing AS builder

# Ensure npm scripts are not run during install in this dev container
ENV NPM_CONFIG_IGNORE_SCRIPTS=true

# Set working directory to repository root (as in the repo layout)
WORKDIR "/go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism"

# Copy source to image
COPY . .

# Install/build dependencies and build both back-end (Go) and front-end (JS)
RUN make dep && make build-go && make build-js

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM photoprism/develop:260309-questing AS runtime

# Create a non-root user to run the server
RUN id -u photoprism >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m photoprism

WORKDIR "/go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism"

# Copy the built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism /go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism

# Ensure correct permissions for the non-root user
RUN chown -R photoprism:photoprism /go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism
USER photoprism

# Expose the default PhotoPrism port
EXPOSE 2342

# Run the server in foreground
CMD ["./photoprism"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder
FROM ubuntu:noble-20260210.1 AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    build-essential \
    pkg-config \
    libjpeg-dev libpng-dev libwebp-dev \
    libx11-dev libgl1-mesa-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Go toolchain
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends golang-go \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Node.js (for frontend assets)
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory to repository root
WORKDIR "/photoprism"

# Copy source
COPY . .

# Build steps
RUN make dep && make build-go && make build-js

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM ubuntu:noble-20260210.1 AS runtime

# Create a non-root user to run the server
RUN useradd -m photoprism

WORKDIR "/photoprism"

# Copy the built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /photoprism /photoprism

# Fix permissions and run as non-root
RUN chown -R photoprism:photoprism /photoprism
USER photoprism

# Expose the default PhotoPrism port
EXPOSE 2342

# Command to run the server in foreground
CMD ["./photoprism"]
"}

- After adding wget/unzip, monitoring downloads to confirm facenet/nasnet/nsfw/SCRFD models are saved to expected paths (facenet.zip, nasnet.zip, nsfw.zip) and the corresponding version.txt files get created.
- If relying on a git repo, confirm the source context is a proper git checkout or adapt scripts to work with a non-git tarball.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder
FROM ubuntu:noble-20260210.1 AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    wget \
    unzip \
    build-essential \
    pkg-config \
    libjpeg-dev libpng-dev libwebp-dev \
    libx11-dev libgl1-mesa-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Go toolchain
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends golang-go \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Node.js (for frontend assets)
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory to repository root
WORKDIR "/photoprism"

# Environment to avoid requiring a git repository for versioning
ENV BUILD_VERSION=local
ENV BUILD_TAG=local

# Copy source
COPY . .

# Build steps
RUN make dep && make build-go && make build-js

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM ubuntu:noble-20260210.1 AS runtime

# Create a non-root user to run the server
RUN useradd -m photoprism

WORKDIR "/photoprism"

# Copy the built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /photoprism /photoprism

# Fix permissions and run as non-root
RUN chown -R photoprism:photoprism /photoprism
USER photoprism

# Expose the default PhotoPrism port
EXPOSE 2342

# Command to run the server in foreground
CMD ["./photoprism"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder
FROM photoprism/develop:jammy AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Workdir set to repository root
WORKDIR "/photoprism"

# Environment to avoid requiring a git repository for versioning
ENV BUILD_VERSION=local
ENV BUILD_DATE=000000

# Copy source
COPY . .

# Build steps
RUN make dep && make build-go && make build-js

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM photoprism/develop:jammy AS runtime

# Create a non-root user to run the server
RUN useradd -m photoprism

WORKDIR "/photoprism"

# Copy the built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /photoprism /photoprism

# Fix permissions and run as non-root
RUN chown -R photoprism:photoprism /photoprism
USER photoprism

# Expose the default PhotoPrism port
EXPOSE 2342

# Command to run the server in foreground
CMD ["./photoprism"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder
FROM ubuntu:noble-20260210.1 AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# System dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    git \
    wget \
    unzip \
    build-essential \
    pkg-config \
    libjpeg-dev libpng-dev libwebp-dev \
    libx11-dev libgl1-mesa-dev \
    libtiff-dev \
    libvips-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Go toolchain
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends golang-go \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Node.js (for frontend assets)
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone the repository to ensure a valid .git directory is present
RUN git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/photoprism/photoprism.git /photoprism

# Set working directory to repository root
WORKDIR "/photoprism"

# Environment to indicate a local build if git metadata is unavailable
ENV BUILD_VERSION=local
ENV BUILD_TAG=local

# Build steps (may download external resources during dep)
RUN make dep && make build-go && make build-js

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM ubuntu:noble-20260210.1 AS runtime

# Create a non-root user to run the server
RUN useradd -m photoprism

WORKDIR "/photoprism"

# Copy the built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /photoprism /photoprism

# Fix permissions and run as non-root
RUN chown -R photoprism:photoprism /photoprism
USER photoprism

# Expose the default PhotoPrism port
EXPOSE 2342

# Command to run the server in foreground
CMD ["./photoprism"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder
FROM photoprism/develop:260309-questing AS builder

# Ensure npm scripts are not run during install in this dev container
ENV NPM_CONFIG_IGNORE_SCRIPTS=true

# Set working directory to repository root (as in the repo layout)
WORKDIR "/go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism"

# Copy source to image
COPY . .

# Install/build dependencies and build both back-end (Go) and front-end (JS)
RUN make dep && make build-go && make build-js

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM photoprism/develop:260309-questing AS runtime

# Create a non-root user to run the server
RUN id -u photoprism >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m photoprism

WORKDIR "/go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism"

# Copy the built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism /go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism

# Ensure correct permissions for the non-root user
RUN chown -R photoprism:photoprism /go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism
USER photoprism

# Expose the default PhotoPrism port
EXPOSE 2342

# Run the server in foreground
CMD ["./photoprism"]
"}

artifacts.content:
# Stage 1: Builder
FROM photoprism/develop:260309-questing AS builder

# Ensure npm scripts are not run during install in this dev container
ENV NPM_CONFIG_IGNORE_SCRIPTS=true

# Set working directory to repository root (as in the repo layout)
WORKDIR "/go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism"

# Copy source to image
COPY . .

# Install/build dependencies and build both back-end (Go) and front-end (JS)
RUN make dep && make build-go && make build-js

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM photoprism/develop:260309-questing AS runtime

# Create a non-root user to run the server
RUN id -u photoprism >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m photoprism

WORKDIR "/go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism"

# Copy the built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism /go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism

# Ensure correct permissions for the non-root user
RUN chown -R photoprism:photoprism /go/src/github.com/photoprism/photoprism
USER photoprism

# Expose the default PhotoPrism port
EXPOSE 2342

# Run the server in foreground
CMD ["./photoprism"]
